entries.description: Comment says Task 2.2 will implement the fix and BUG CONFIRMED tests should FAIL, but per the task summary, all fixes were already in source code. The comment is stale/misleading.
entries.suggestion: Update the file header comment to reflect that fixes are already in place and all tests now pass as regression guards.

entries.description: TestBuildWritesDispatchArtifactsAndUpdatesState expects dispatch_count=5 but runtime produces 7. Test expectation was changed in working tree (from 7 to 5) but runtime dispatch logic was not correspondingly updated. Pre-existing mismatch from earlier phase, not caused by Phase 3.
entries.suggestion: Update test expectations back to 7 or update dispatch logic to match the 5-dispatch expectation

entries.description: TestBuildPlanOnlyPrintsDispatchManifestWithoutMutatingState expects dispatch_count=5 but runtime produces 7. Same root cause as above.

TestBuildPlanOnlyKeepsRoutineUIQueenSelectionLean expects castes=[builder probe watcher] but runtime produces [builder probe watcher measurer chaos]. Queen execution policy produces more castes than test expects.
entries.suggestion: Update test to match current Queen execution policy behavior

entries.description: TestBuildVisualOutputShowsSpawnPlan expects Verification [standard] section but output shows Verification [heavy] because single-phase plan is always final phase. Pre-existing issue, file not modified in Phase 3.
entries.suggestion: Update test to expect heavy for single-phase plan or use multi-phase test setup

entries.description: 4 pre-existing test failures in codex_build_test.go (dispatch_count 7 vs expected 5) and codex_visuals_test.go (missing Verification stage marker) — unrelated to Phase 4 result validation hardening
entries.suggestion: Update test expectations to match current runtime dispatch behavior in a dedicated fix phase
